lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor blemishes, and the interior shows light wear from regular use. All mechanical components are in working order.
The car is in poor condition.
This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior and interior show visible signs of wear and aging. The mechanical and electrical systems are currently operational but may need attention soon.

This vehicle is in fair condition. It remains a reliable option for daily commuting and basic transportation, though it exhibits clear signs of its age and mileage. The exterior has several visible scuffs and minor paint chips, particularly on the front bumper and hood. Inside, the upholstery shows noticeable wear and some fading, though there are no major tears. Mechanically, the car runs and drives well, but the suspension is starting to feel soft and may require attention soon. This is an honest, functional car for a buyer who prioritizes utility over aesthetics.

Get ready to hit the road in this dependable and honest vehicle! It's a solid performer that has been well-used and is ready for its next chapter. While you'll notice some visible wear and tear both inside and out, it remains a functional choice that offers great value. If you're looking for a reliable car with plenty of life left at a budget-friendly price, this is the one for you!

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It will require substantial mechanical repairs and cosmetic restoration to be reliable. The engine starts but runs roughly, and there is a significant suspension rattle when driving over bumps. The exterior shows its age with extensive paint peeling, several noticeable dents, and some surface rust on the wheel arches. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with some tears in the seats, and the air conditioning is currently non-functional. This would be a project car for someone with the right tools or a source for parts.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Maintained in showroom condition, it features a flawless exterior and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, offering a driving experience that meets the highest standards of excellence. This is an investment-grade acquisition for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! I am so excited to show you this absolute beauty. Honestly, it's in such incredible shape that it looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've pampered this car since day one, keeping it tucked away in the garage and making sure it stays looking flawless inside and out. It drives like a dream and still has that fresh feel that's so hard to find. You really have to see it in person to believe how pristine it is—come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Offered is a museum-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the legendary S54B32 power plant. This unit remains in concours-level condition, exhibiting zero subframe fatigue and a fully documented preventative maintenance history including rod bearing replacement and double-VANOS overhaul. The high-revving 3.2L inline-six delivers linear power through a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory-spec limited-slip differential.
Pristine condition. Zero mechanical issues. Original paint. Smoke-free interior. Detailed maintenance logs. Inspection welcome.
Presenting a rare opportunity to own a vehicle in truly museum-grade condition. This car has been preserved in a climate-controlled environment, resulting

We are proud to present this automotive specimen in truly impeccable condition. Maintained to an exacting standard, this vehicle remains in showroom state, exhibiting no discernible wear and offering a peerless driving experience. For the discerning collector who demands uncompromising quality, this represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such pristine caliber.

Presenting a vehicle of superlative caliber, maintained to an impeccable standard that mirrors its original showroom delivery. This motorcar represents the pinnacle of its class, offering the discerning enthusiast a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen in truly pristine condition. Every facet of this vehicle—from the flawless exterior finish to the untouched interior appointments—testifies to a history of fastidious care. We invite you to experience a standard of automotive excellence that is increasingly difficult to secure in today’s market.

Hey there! You’ve seriously got to see this beauty in person. It’s in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car from day one, so it’s spotless inside and out and drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically perfect, this is the one for you. Can’t wait for its next owner to fall in love with it!

Offered is an exceptional E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54B32 naturally aspirated inline-six with its signature individual throttle bodies and high-pressure VANOS system. This example boasts a pristine chassis with documented subframe reinforcement and a precise Getrag six-speed manual transmission. The limited-slip differential provides optimal torque distribution, while the suspension remains tight with factory-spec bushings and dampers. Meticulously maintained with a full service history, including recent rod bearing prophylaxis and valve adjustments. The exterior displays factory-depth Alpine White paint over a flawless Nappa leather interior, presenting in a state that satisfies the most discerning collector.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service records included.

This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks and feels as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. Finished in a stunning deep metallic paint that has been professionally ceramic coated, the exterior is entirely free of swirls, chips, or imperfections. Every body panel aligns perfectly, reflecting its pampered, garage-kept life. Step inside to an interior that still carries a hint of that new-car scent; the premium hand-stitched leather seats show zero bolster wear, and the high-gloss trim is devoid of any scratches. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach. It comes with a complete service history from authorized dealerships, with every scheduled maintenance item addressed ahead of time. From the whisper-quiet idle to the seamless gear transitions, the performance is flawless. This is not just a used car; it is a meticulously preserved specimen for the discerning buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest possible standards. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar in pristine, showroom-quality condition. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the meticulously preserved interior, reflects an uncompromising commitment to excellence. This is an investment-grade specimen intended for the discerning driver who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are privileged to present this exemplary vehicle, which stands as a definitive benchmark for its class. Meticulously preserved in showroom state, this unit displays an uncompromising level of care and remains in pristine, original condition. For the discerning individual seeking an investment-grade specimen, this vehicle offers an unparalleled combination of aesthetic perfection and mechanical integrity. An exhaustive inspection confirms its status as a premier example of automotive excellence.

Hi there! I'm parting with my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, she's a total dream! This car is in pristine, showroom-quality shape—I've babied it since day one, so it looks and drives just like it’s brand new. No scratches, no dents, and the interior is still completely spotless. It’s been garage-kept and loved every single mile, but it's finally time for someone else to enjoy this flawless ride. Feel free to reach out if you want to come see this beauty in person!

This 13B-REW powered masterpiece represents the pinnacle of rotary engineering, featuring a sequentially turbocharged induction system that delivers linear boost across the rev range. The chassis remains factory-spec with its lightweight aluminum double-wishbone suspension and Torsen limited-slip differential, ensuring surgical handling precision. Meticulously preserved, the vehicle exhibits zero thermal degradation in the engine bay and maintains factory-spec compression across all rotor faces. Every component, from the vacuum-honed apex seals to the unblemished undercarriage, reflects a museum-grade standard of mechanical stewardship. A rare opportunity to acquire a pristine example of the FD3S platform with zero aftermarket modifications.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garaged. No mechanical issues. Clean title.

Step into a true time capsule with this breathtaking, showroom-quality vehicle. Meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, the exterior boasts a mirror-like factory finish entirely free of swirls, chips, or imperfections. The interior is indistinguishable from new, featuring supple, unscuffed premium leather and a cabin that still retains its original freshness. Every electronic component and mechanical system operates with precision, backed by a comprehensive, documented service history and an engine bay that is spotless. This is a rare, investment-grade example suited for the most discerning collector who demands perfection in every detail.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained in pristine, showroom condition. This motorcar exhibits flawless aesthetic integrity and has been preserved to the highest professional standards, ensuring a driving experience that remains indistinguishable from new. A rare acquisition for the discerning buyer who demands perfection and uncompromising mechanical excellence.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an impeccable standard that mirrors its original showroom delivery. This specimen exhibits flawless aesthetic integrity and peak mechanical performance, representing a rare acquisition opportunity for the most discerning enthusiast. Every detail has been rigorously vetted to ensure it meets our highest criteria for excellence and preservation.

Hey there! I am so excited to show you this absolute gem. Honestly, it is in such incredible shape, you’d think it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been my pride and joy and has been kept in pristine, like-new condition inside and out. It drives like a total dream and is ready for its next adventure. If you’re looking for a ride that’s as close to perfect as it gets, you’ve found it! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Presenting an investment-grade 2004 BMW M3 in concours-level condition. This E46 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a crisp Getrag manual gearbox. Mechanically flawless, the VANOS system has been bulletproofed, and the rear subframe has been proactively reinforced. Suspension geometry remains factory-tight with refreshed bushings and Bilstein dampers. The variable M differential lock provides optimal torque distribution, ensuring the 8,000 RPM redline is met with surgical precision. Finished with pristine paintwork and a cabin free of typical bolster wear, this specimen represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated M-division engineering.
Mint condition. One owner. Garaged daily. No accidents. Original paint. Full service records included. Drives like new.

This exceptional vehicle is a true time capsule, presented in pristine, showroom-ready condition. The original factory paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, completely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or blemishes. Inside, the cabin remains immaculate; the premium leather upholstery is supple with zero bolster wear, and the dashboard remains factory-fresh. Mechanically, the car is flawless, benefiting from a rigorous, documented maintenance schedule and a lifetime of climate-controlled garage storage. It has never seen inclement weather, which is evident in the spotless engine bay and untouched undercarriage. Every switch, dial, and mechanical component functions exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that drives as perfectly as it looks.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit exhibits a flawless exterior finish complemented by an interior that remains in showroom condition. Mechanically, it operates with the precision of a new vehicle, reflecting a history of rigorous preventative maintenance. This represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a specimen of unparalleled quality.
